dc_description_s: This data represents building sites for Milwaukee County, Wisconsin in 2026. [points representing locations of addresses - points are placed within the parcel with which an address is assocated - when possible, points are placed within the footprint of the building with which an address is associated - when a parcel or building is associated with multiple addresses, multiple points will be placed within each parcel or building - includes keys that relate to related street centerlines, addressable building polygons, and parcel polygons]
uw_supplemental_s: This is an archived copy of the data held at UW-Madison.
